metadata.name: Troubleshooting - Caller ID Showing Wrong Name

description: A customer reports that when they call people, the wrong name is appearing on the recipient's Caller ID.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's name as it is listed on the account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the correct name is on the account.

nodes.task_description: Check the public CNAM (Caller ID Name) database for the customer's number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the CNAM database has an old, incorrect name associated with the number.

nodes.task_description: Submit a request to update the CNAM database with the correct name.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the CNAM update request.
